title: Jesus Roulette
description: When you die there's a small chance that you will be saved by Jesus.
body:
Adds a small chance of getting saved by Jesus on death.
- 10% chance to get saved.
- 1% chance to get saved and buffed (same effects as an enchanted golden apple).

Inspired by Eternal Jesus (https://modrinth.com/mod/eternal-jesus)
